title: Malaysian Roast Duck
description: A classic Southeast Asian dish featuring a crispy-skinned roast duck served with a side of savory Malaysian flavors.

ingredients.name: Malaysian
ingredients.notes: spice blend (e.g. 2 tsp soy sauce, 1 tsp brown sugar, 1 tsp five-spice powder)

instructions: Rinse the duck and pat dry with paper towels.
Season the duck with salt and pepper.
Heat the melted butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the duck to a baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the skin is crispy and the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
While the duck is roasting, mix the Malaysian spice blend ingredients together in a small bowl.
Brush the spice blend onto the duck during the last 10 minutes of roasting.
Remove the duck from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
